source: Creator Monetize — Sales, Objections, Monetization + Sales Call Script + Calendly

sales_framework.name: Pain x Confidence Framework
sales_framework.pain: Cannot be created, only amplified through difficult questions
core_tenets: DO NOT JUDGE (never assume who can/can't afford)
DO NOT EASILY GIVE UP (spend 20-30 min in objection phase)
sales_framework.frame_control: Every sales situation has 2 frames. Never leave yours and enter theirs. Whoever breaks frame loses.
sales_framework.oscillation_rule: Only judge a sales process after 30 calls. Never before.

stages.name: Mini Rapport
stages.description: Brief personal connection to build comfort. Keep it short.

stages.name: Agenda
stages.description: Set expectations for the call structure and timing.

stages.name: Find the Problem
stages.description: Ask questions to uncover their core pain point.

stages.name: Understand Where They're At
stages.description: Assess their current situation, what they've tried, where they are now.

stages.name: Indirectly Cause Pain
stages.description: Through questions, amplify awareness of their pain without being manipulative.

stages.name: Future Pace
stages.description: Paint the picture of their life after the problem is solved.

stages.name: Statement of Defeat
stages.description: Must get 1 of 3 specific responses before proceeding to pitch.

stages.name: Getting Conviction
stages.description: Build their belief that change is possible and achievable.

stages.name: Transition to Pitch
stages.description: Natural bridge from discovery to presenting the solution.

stages.name: Vaguely Pitch Your Offer
stages.description: Present the offer at a high level — outcomes and components, not granular details.

stages.name: Post Pitch Process
stages.description: Pulse check 1-10, resolve obstacles, handle concerns.

stages.name: Price Drop
stages.description: Reveal the price after value is established.

pre_call_checklist: Be ready with payment link open
Release emotions — be calm and neutral
Stop focusing on closing — focus on helping
Have Calendly answers pulled up on screen

statement_of_defeat_responses.name: Statement of Defeat — Must Get 1 of 3
statement_of_defeat_responses.description: Do NOT proceed to pitch until the prospect gives one of these three responses
responses: They can't do it alone / they lack the knowledge
They want to do it faster / they want a shortcut
They want a proven system and mentorship

follow_up.name: Post-Call Follow Up
rules: Schedule follow-up ON THE CALL — never leave it open-ended
Offer to send an email with more info
Email template includes: call recording, testimonials, case studies

objection_handling.name: DECPC Formula
objection_handling.principle: 80% of objections are smokescreens covering the real one

handling_steps.example: I'm sorry you had this experience, I'd feel the same way if...
And this is why it'll be so much easier to get X...
Does that give you a bit more confidence/clarity?
Are you sure? I'm happy to dive deeper

diagnostic_tools: Confidence loops — end every response with confident statement
Reties — tie back to dream outcome, get verbal confirmation
Pulse Check — Does that give you more confidence/clarity?
Temp Check — 1-10 scale on where they stand

pre_launch.name: Pre-Launch Method
pre_launch.concept: Sell BEFORE fully built — build momentum, collect cash, prove concept
steps: Have offer, funnel, product breakdown ready
Choose: Quiet (email list only) or Loud (all social channels)
Add 20-50% discount + frame 1-3 bonuses as 'pre-launch bonuses'
Add 3+ points of messaging on funnel about pre-launch offer
When launching: change price, adjust discount, remove pre-launch messaging

presentation_scripting.name: Webinar/Live Presentation Script
structure: Who is this for / NOT for
Hero's Journey (no solution → discovered → life with solution)
THE CROSSROADS — 3 paths: Do nothing / DIY / Let us help
presentation_scripting.critical_rule: Teach WHAT, never HOW. Create desire, not completion.
presentation_scripting.book_a_call_variant: Same but do NOT state price. CTA = book a call.

platforms.youtube: Funnel from video descriptions, end screens, pinned comments
platforms.instagram: Link in bio, story swipe-ups, DM automation (ManyChat)
platforms.tiktok: Profile link, comment triggers, creator fund reinvestment

typical_sequence.name: Typical Sequence Scripting (for course/lesson videos)
structure: Signature Opening Line: 'What's up future {desired_outcome}! It's {name} here'
The Big Hook (what video is about, create excitement)
Provide Value (sequential points with structure, not rambles)
Signature Sign Off: 'That's it for today's lesson, I'll see you in the next one'
principles: Quality Matters: product quality is upstream of content quality
Detail: go deep, cover all ground, holistic understanding
Simplicity: clean and lean, only add detail if it makes sense
Teaching Children: imagine clients have zero understanding
